title: 团队空间与数据隔离

scope.summary: 落地 M4-7 评估中 team_workspace_isolation: not_ready：引入 team_id/workspace_id，新增服务端沉淀对象持久层并按团队/owner 行级强隔离；查询层强制租户过滤，跨团队/跨用户默认不可见；team_id 为空等同单用户私有；ENABLE_TEAM_WORKSPACE 默认 false，关闭回 M5-2/M4 末态。

isolation_rules.single_user_private_clause: owner_user_id == ctx.owner_user_id AND team_id IS NULL
isolation_rules.team_clause: (own private rows) OR (team_id == ctx.team_id AND visibility == 'team')
isolation_rules.non_member_team_id: downgraded to single-user private (reason_code=not_a_member), never reads other team data
isolation_rules.write_tenant_consistency: assert_write_within_tenant: write team_id must equal context team_id; team visibility requires active team context

compat_and_fallback.disabled_behavior: all /api/team/* return 403 TEAM_WORKSPACE_DISABLED; lazy init zero side-effect; no tables created; back to M5-2/M4 single-user private end state
compat_and_fallback.frontend_disabled: TeamWorkspacePanel renders null; no team API calls

api_focused_plus_gate.command: pytest test_m5_team_isolation + test_health + test_search_api_fallback_smoke + test_feature_flag_rollback + test_performance_smoke

api_regression.command: pytest test_m5_account_system + test_m5_commercial_entry_contract + test_m4_workflow_entry_contract + test_m4_team_reuse + test_release_gate

web_tests.result: 242 passed (235 M5-2 baseline + 7 new M5-3), all files pass when isolated; the 55 failures only appeared under --singleFork (cross-file localStorage/module state bleed), not under default isolated pool

web_build.result: 118 modules transformed, RC=0 (mounted dist EPERM on delete only; verified via fresh outDir)

privacy_grep.result: no body/credential persistence; forbidden keys appear only in denylist guard; both read paths enforce tenant_visibility_clause; all flags default false

next_step: M5-4 权限分级与对象级访问控制 (permission_tiering)
